nasb.text: For just as the sufferings of Christ are ours in abundance, so also our comfort is abundant through Christ.

esv.text: For as we share abundantly in Christ’s sufferings, so through Christ we share abundantly in comfort too.

cnv.text: 我們既然多受基督所受的痛苦，就靠著基督多得安慰。

ccb.text: 正如我们多受基督所受的苦楚，也靠基督多得安慰。

csbs.text: 因为基督的苦难怎样充充满满临到我们，藉着基督，我们的安慰也照样充充满满。
